en: Hey everyone here I am within another shot and today we'll be discussing some
of the confusing words of English. So the number one is desert and dessert.
Dessert is a sweet dish whereas desert is a hot dry place. Number two borrow and
lend. Borrow is to take something whereas lend is to give something and expecting
it back as well. Number three is effect or effects. Effect is to have an
impact on something whereas effect is the result of being affected. So make
sure next time you use them you use them correctly in your situations. Thank you
